title: client data access
description: Client handling algorithms — multi-client data access. Key topics: @ClientHandling.algorithm controls how the ABAP framework. Available algorithms:. #AUTOMATIC_RHS is the DEFAULT — adds AND client = $session.client.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆@ClientHandling.algorithm controls how the ABAP framework
◆Available algorithms:
◆#AUTOMATIC_RHS is the DEFAULT — adds AND client = $session.client
◆#INHERITED: the view does NOT add its own client filter but
◆Use #PROTECTED for views that should not add client filters
◆The client field must be present in the view or an error occurs
◆@Environment.systemField: #CLIENT on the field is good practice

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆@ClientHandling.algorithm controls how the ABAP framework
◆Available algorithms:
◆#AUTOMATIC_RHS is the DEFAULT — adds AND client = $session.client
◆#INHERITED: the view does NOT add its own client filter but
◆Use #PROTECTED for views that should not add client filters
◆The client field must be present in the view or an error occurs
◆@Environment.systemField: #CLIENT on the field is good practice

CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_CLIENT'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - Client handling algorithm (#AUTOMATIC_RHS)'
@ClientHandling.algorithm: #AUTOMATIC_RHS
define view ZPRAC_CDS_CLIENT_HANDLING
  as select from /dmo/travel
{
  @Environment.systemField: #CLIENT
  key client            as Client,
  key travel_id         as TravelId,
      agency_id         as AgencyId,
      customer_id       as CustomerId,
      @Semantics.date: true
      begin_date        as BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      end_date          as EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      booking_fee       as BookingFee,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      total_price       as TotalPrice,
      currency_code     as CurrencyCode,
      description       as Description,
      status            as Status
}
details:
handles the MANDT (client) field

┌────────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────┐

│ Algorithm │ Behavior │

├────────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────┤

│ #AUTOMATIC_RHS │ Default — add implicit CLIENT = sy-mandt │

│ #PROTECTED │ Inherit client from source (read-only) │

│ #AUTOMATIC │ Add implicit client (like RHS) │

│ #INHERITED │ Client field inherited from source │

│ #RHS_ONLY │ Only Right-Hand Side implicit filter │

│ #DONT_SHARE │ No client sharing across sources │

│ #NO_CLIENT │ No client handling at all │

└────────────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────────┘

relies on the base view/view's client handling

(e.g., cross-client views or local temporary data)

USE CASE:

Standard views need #AUTOMATIC_RHS (default) to ensure client

separation. Cross-client reference data (like currencies, units)

may use #INHERITED or #NO_CLIENT.
